hook.text: UNITED MAKE SHOCK ENQUIRY FOR SUMMERVILLE

beats.text: THE MOVE COMES AFTER HIS WORLD CUP GOAL FOR NETHERLANDS
WEST HAM WANT £50M FOR THE DUTCH WINGER
ANY DEAL HINGES ON RASHFORD'S FUTURE AT UNITED

caption: Shock development at Old Trafford 🔴 Manchester United have made an enquiry for West Ham winger Crysencio Summerville after he scored for the Netherlands in their 2-2 World Cup draw with Japan. West Ham value him at £50m — but any pursuit depends entirely on what happens with Marcus Rashford. He's 24, cuts inside from the left, and Carrick rates him as an elite option. Want Summerville in red? 🔴 REPORTED — per Sky Sports / Goal.com. #mufc #manutd #premierleague #football #transfernews #transferwindow
